name: phoenix-doc-expert
description: Enterprise document processing expert using Phoenix intelligent document platform

displayDescription.en: Recognize documents with multimodal AI, then archive, validate, store and retrieve via Phoenix: field extraction, structured & field-level query, and semantic Q&A over document content.
displayDescription.zh: 用多模态大模型识别单据，经 Phoenix 平台归档、校验、入库与检索：字段提取、结构化与字段级查询、文件内容语义问答。

defaultInitPrompt.en: Help me upload and process a document
